name: nexstack-workspace
description: Enterprise-grade fullstack starter for rapid SaaS development

scripts.db:migrate: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend npm run migration:run
scripts.db:seed: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend npm run seed
scripts.db:generate: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend npm run migration:generate
scripts.bash:backend: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend sh
